results.reply: Pricing depends on volume, geography, and the rails you want to use, so I can’t quote it accurately here. At $50M/month in the EU, it likely makes sense to walk through your USDC pay-in flow on a short call and scope the right setup. Happy to do that here: https://calendly.com/ivy-sales/discovery

Fair question. If BVNK is working well for you, there may be no reason to switch — Ivy is worth a look if you're evaluating faster or cheaper pay-in / pay-out rails for your exchange setup. We focus on crypto-native banking and payments across rails like SEPA Instant, ACH, FPS, and cards; if helpful, I can share a quick side-by-side on a short call.
